# ListTree

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="ListTree icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="ListTree" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ListTree;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ListTree { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
tree, browser

## Categories
files, text, layout

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/list-tree)
